# NEXO Brain

> Open-source cognitive runtime with a shared brain for Claude Code, Codex, Claude Desktop, and other MCP clients (v2.6.13).

NEXO Brain gives AI agents persistent memory using the Atkinson-Shiffrin cognitive architecture. It adds a local shared brain across supported clients, configurable terminal and automation backends, recovery-aware background jobs, a runtime CLI, self-healing schedules, and 150+ MCP tools.

## Core Product Model

- Shared brain is the baseline.
- Interactive client and automation backend are configurable separately.
- Claude Code is still the recommended path because it has the deepest hook and automation integration.
- Codex is supported as both terminal client and automation backend.
- Claude Desktop can share the same brain through MCP.

## Key Features

- Three-store memory: Sensory Register, Short-Term Memory, Long-Term Memory
- Semantic search with local embeddings and optional HNSW acceleration
- Claim graph, trust scoring, metacognitive guard, and cognitive dissonance detection
- Episodic memory, followups, learnings, reminders, and session continuity
- Context continuity across Claude Code compaction via hooks
- Shared-brain client sync for Claude Code, Codex, and Claude Desktop
- Configurable `nexo chat` terminal client
- Configurable automation backend with client-specific model profiles
- Self-healing runtime with `nexo doctor`, `nexo update`, and managed schedule reconciliation
- Personal scripts registry with lifecycle tools and official `keep_alive` daemon support
- Always-on local dashboard, recovery-aware crons, and overnight learning
- Claude Code plugin packaging, OpenClaw package, and ClawHub skill

## Recommended Defaults

- Claude Code: recommended primary client
- Claude Code model profile: Opus latest
- Codex model profile: GPT-5.4 xhigh
- Codex is supported, but Claude Code still has the richest integration depth

## Installation

```bash
npx nexo-brain
```

## Update Existing Installations

```bash
nexo update
```

## Re-sync Clients Later

```bash
nexo clients sync
```

## Main Commands

- `nexo chat` — open the configured terminal client
- `nexo update` — sync the installed runtime
- `nexo doctor` — audit and repair runtime health
- `nexo clients sync` — reconfigure shared-brain client integrations

## Documentation

- Website: https://nexo-brain.com
- Changelog: https://nexo-brain.com/changelog/
- Blog: https://nexo-brain.com/blog/
- Docs: https://nexo-brain.com/docs/
- GitHub: https://github.com/wazionapps/nexo
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/nexo-brain

## Compatibility

NEXO Brain exposes its capabilities as MCP tools. It is compatible with MCP-capable environments and currently has explicit shared-brain flows for Claude Code, Codex, and Claude Desktop.
